workflow_meta.reference_product: 40oz insulated travel tumbler with handle and straw

product_profile.name: 40oz Stainless Steel Insulated Travel Tumbler with Handle, Straw Lid, and Cupholder Base
key_features: optional ceramic-lined interior to reduce metallic taste

specs.suitable_ages: Office workers, drivers, gym users, students
specs.materials: 18/8 stainless steel body, BPA-free lid and straw
specs.package_contents: tumbler, straw lid, reusable straw, cleaning brush
specs.certifications: supplier to confirm LFGB/FDA food contact compliance
specs.colors: cream white, sage green, lavender, matte black

product_profile.supplier_name: Demo supplier from 1688 search: stainless steel tumbler manufacturer
product_profile.key_selling_point: A 40oz cupholder-friendly tumbler built for all-day cold drinks at office, gym, and commute.
product_profile.differentiation_direction: Differentiate with spill-resistant lid, better grip handle, and no-metallic-taste interior option.
product_profile.target_audience: Office commuters and gym users who want a large stylish tumbler without paying premium viral-brand pricing.
product_profile.visual_style: Bright hydration scenes, car cupholder fit, pastel color lineup, cold condensation details.

image_needs.requirement: 40oz sage green stainless steel insulated tumbler with handle and straw lid, narrow base, ice water condensation, clean white background, professional product photography, high detail
Infographic-style product photo showing double-wall insulation, 40oz capacity, cupholder-friendly base, straw lid, ergonomic handle, clean labels, high detail
Lifestyle photo of a commuter placing a lavender 40oz tumbler into a car cupholder beside a gym bag, morning sunlight, realistic daily scene

versions.title: 大容量杯子别乱买
versions.body: 之前跟风买过很重的杯子，装满水以后手腕真的累。这只 40oz 保温杯比较适合我，手柄好握，底部能放进车载杯架，早上装冰水通勤到公司还很凉。它是双层不锈钢保温，配吸管盖，边开车边喝也方便。最加分的是可以选陶瓷内胆版本，喝水没有明显金属味。想要大容量但不想花太多买网红杯的人，可以重点看这种配置。

versions.title: 我的通勤杯终于换对了
versions.body: 我现在每天出门前都会装一大杯冰水，这个 40oz 杯子刚好够我上午喝。它有手柄和吸管盖，开车、健身、坐办公室都顺手。底部是窄的，可以放进车杯架，不会像普通大杯子那样没地方放。双层不锈钢保温够用，夏天放冰块很安心。颜色我选了鼠尾草绿，放桌上也好看，喝水频率真的变高了。

cover.why_this_image: Clearly shows the tumbler shape, handle, straw lid, and premium color.
cover.required_if_missing: Provide a clear front or three-quarter real product photo for the cover.

feature.why_this_image: Explains why the tumbler is practical, not just good-looking.
feature.required_if_missing: Provide real product detail images that show the key feature.

lifestyle.why_this_image: Shows car cupholder fit and commute/gym use case.
lifestyle.required_if_missing: Provide a real use-scene photo or a supplier lifestyle image.

publish_result.title: 我的通勤杯终于换对了
publish_result.next_action: Review the package and publish through the approved operator workflow.
publish_result.policy_note: Direct Xiaohongshu publishing demo is paused. The Agent prepares a publish-ready package for approved operator workflow.
operator_checklist: 确认图片来自真实商品/供应商/用户提供
复核标题、正文、话题和价格表述
由人工在平台完成发布

faq_list.Q_zh: 这个杯子能放车杯架吗？
faq_list.A_zh: 可以，底部是窄底设计，适配大多数车载杯架，具体还要看车型尺寸。
faq_list.Q_en: Does it fit car cup holders?
faq_list.A_en: Yes, the narrow base fits most car cup holders, depending on the vehicle size.

faq_list.A_zh: 普通款是不锈钢内胆；如介意金属味，建议选择陶瓷内胆版本。
faq_list.Q_en: Does it have a metallic taste?
faq_list.A_en: The standard version is stainless steel. Choose the ceramic-lined option if you are sensitive to metallic taste.

faq_list.A_zh: 日常防泼溅没问题，但吸管杯不建议倒置放包里。
faq_list.A_en: It is splash-resistant for daily use, but straw tumblers should not be stored upside down in a bag.

sample_replies.reply: 日常拿着走、防泼溅没问题，但因为是吸管盖，不建议倒置放包里，更适合车里、桌面和健身房使用。

pain_points.pain: Large tumblers can feel heavy when full.
pain_points.fix: Show filled weight expectation and handle grip detail in listing.

pain_points.typical_quote: 倒过来还是会从吸管口漏。
pain_points.fix: Avoid claiming full leakproof if straw lid cannot seal upside down.

actions: Change claim from leakproof to splash-resistant
phase_1.impact: Reduce complaint risk and increase buyer trust

invalid_points: Do not overpromise leakproof performance for straw lids.
new_insights: Weight and lid sealing are stronger purchase concerns than color alone.
loopback.next_selection_adjustment: Prioritize lighter body, better lid seal, and explicit cupholder-fit dimensions.

next_research_seed.recommended_keyword: 40oz ceramic lined insulated tumbler handle straw cupholder
next_research_seed.new_target_audience: Commuters and gym users who want large capacity but worry about leaks and weight.
next_research_seed.price_band_adjustment: Retail around $24.99-34.99; offer 30oz alternative for weight-sensitive users.

audience_takeaway: product image order and shot list

stage_progress.Now doing: 选择演示商品并建立产品事实
stage_progress.Why it matters: 选品先判断商品是否值得继续，避免后续内容空转。
stage_progress.Need from you: 选择商品或提供链接、图片、供应价。
stage_progress.Expected output: 产品画像和 go/no-go 结论。

stage_progress.Why it matters: 客户需要看到这个商品不只是能写文案，也有经营可行性。
stage_progress.Need from you: 采购价、目标平台和预期毛利。
stage_progress.Expected output: 保守/建议/进取三个价格。

stage_progress.Why it matters: 平台发布动作可由人工确认，但素材必须完整可用。
stage_progress.Need from you: 确认账号、平台规则和最终发布边界。
stage_progress.Expected output: 标题、正文、标签、图片顺序和操作清单。

compliance_warnings: 不要标注无法证明的原价或限时折扣。
